issue.message:
Library lint checks out of date; these checks **will be skipped**!
Lint found an issue registry (`androidx.navigation.common.lint.NavigationCommonIssueRegistry`) which was compiled against an older version of lint than this one. This is usually fine, but not in this case; some basic verification shows that the lint check jar references (for example) the following API which is no longer valid in this version of lint: com.android.tools.lint.checks.infrastructure.LintDetectorTest#kotlin(java.lang.String): com.android.tools.lint.checks.infrastructure.TestFile (Referenced from androidx/navigation/lint/common/LintUtilKt.class)
Therefore, this lint check library is **not** included in analysis. This affects the following lint checks: `EmptyNavDeepLink`,`WrongStartDestinationType`
Recompile the checks against the latest version, or if this is a check bundled with a third-party library, see if there is a more recent version available.
Version of Lint API this lint check is using is 14. The Lint API version currently running is 16 (8.7+).

Library lint checks out of date; these checks **will be skipped**!
Lint found an issue registry (`androidx.navigation.compose.lint.NavigationComposeIssueRegistry`) which was compiled against an older version of lint than this one. This is usually fine, but not in this case; some basic verification shows that the lint check jar references (for example) the following API which is no longer valid in this version of lint: com.android.tools.lint.checks.infrastructure.LintDetectorTest#kotlin(java.lang.String): com.android.tools.lint.checks.infrastructure.TestFile (Referenced from androidx/navigation/lint/common/LintUtilKt.class)
Therefore, this lint check library is **not** included in analysis. This affects the following lint checks: `ComposableDestinationInComposeScope`,`ComposableNavGraphInComposeScope`,`UnrememberedGetBackStackEntry`,`WrongStartDestinationType`
Recompile the checks against the latest version, or if this is a check bundled with a third-party library, see if there is a more recent version available.
Version of Lint API this lint check is using is 14. The Lint API version currently running is 16 (8.7+).

Library lint checks out of date; these checks **will be skipped**!
Lint found an issue registry (`androidx.navigation.runtime.lint.NavigationRuntimeIssueRegistry`) which was compiled against an older version of lint than this one. This is usually fine, but not in this case; some basic verification shows that the lint check jar references (for example) the following API which is no longer valid in this version of lint: com.android.tools.lint.checks.infrastructure.LintDetectorTest#kotlin(java.lang.String): com.android.tools.lint.checks.infrastructure.TestFile (Referenced from androidx/navigation/lint/common/LintUtilKt.class)
Therefore, this lint check library is **not** included in analysis. This affects the following lint checks: `DeepLinkInActivityDestination`,`WrongStartDestinationType`,`WrongNavigateRouteType`
Recompile the checks against the latest version, or if this is a check bundled with a third-party library, see if there is a more recent version available.
Version of Lint API this lint check is using is 14. The Lint API version currently running is 16 (8.7+).
Call requires permission which may be rejected by user: code should explicitly check to see if permission is available (with `checkPermission`) or explicitly handle a potential `SecurityException`
Consider using `apply()` instead; `commit` writes its data to persistent storage immediately, whereas `apply` will handle it in the background
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Not targeting the latest versions of Android; compatibility modes apply. Consider testing and updating this version. Consult the `android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES` javadoc for details.
Found dynamic locale changes, but did not find corresponding Play Core library calls for downloading languages and splitting by language is not disabled in the `bundle` configuration
Consider splitting data tag into multiple tags with individual attributes to avoid confusion
Consider splitting data tag into multiple tags with individual attributes to avoid confusion
Consider splitting data tag into multiple tags with individual attributes to avoid confusion
Consider splitting data tag into multiple tags with individual attributes to avoid confusion
A newer version of Gradle than 9.3.1 is available: 9.4.1
A newer version of `compileSdk` than 35 is available: 36
A newer version of androidx.core:core-ktx than 1.13.1 is available: 1.18.0
A newer version of androidx.lifecycle:lifecycle-runtime-ktx than 2.8.4 is available: 2.10.0
A newer version of androidx.lifecycle:lifecycle-runtime-compose than 2.8.4 is available: 2.10.0
A newer version of androidx.activity:activity-compose than 1.9.0 is available: 1.13.0
A newer version of com.google.android.material:material than 1.12.0 is available: 1.13.0
A newer version of androidx.compose:compose-bom than 2024.09.03 is available: 2026.04.01
A newer version of androidx.navigation:navigation-compose than 2.8.2 is available: 2.9.8
A newer version of com.google.firebase:firebase-bom than 33.4.0 is available: 34.12.0
A newer version of com.google.android.gms:play-services-auth than 21.2.0 is available: 21.5.1
A newer version of com.google.android.gms:play-services-maps than 19.0.0 is available: 20.0.0
A newer version of androidx.room:room-runtime than 2.7.0-alpha11 is available: 2.8.4
A newer version of androidx.room:room-ktx than 2.7.0-alpha11 is available: 2.8.4
A newer version of androidx.room:room-compiler than 2.7.0-alpha11 is available: 2.8.4
A newer version of androidx.camera:camera-core than 1.3.4 is available: 1.6.0
A newer version of androidx.camera:camera-camera2 than 1.3.4 is available: 1.6.0
A newer version of androidx.camera:camera-lifecycle than 1.3.4 is available: 1.6.0
A newer version of androidx.camera:camera-view than 1.3.4 is available: 1.6.0
A newer version of androidx.compose:compose-bom than 2024.09.03 is available: 2026.04.01
A newer version of androidx.test.ext:junit than 1.2.1 is available: 1.3.0
A newer version of androidx.test.espresso:espresso-core than 3.6.1 is available: 3.7.0
A newer version of com.google.maps.android:maps-compose than 6.1.0 is available: 8.3.0
A newer version of com.squareup.retrofit2:retrofit than 2.11.0 is available: 3.0.0
A newer version of com.squareup.retrofit2:converter-gson than 2.11.0 is available: 3.0.0
A newer version of com.google.code.gson:gson than 2.10.1 is available: 2.14.0
For locale "ar" (Arabic) the following quantities should also be defined: `few` (e.g. "3"), `many` (e.g. "11"), `two` (e.g. "2"), `zero` (e.g. "0")
For locale "ar" (Arabic) the following quantities should also be defined: `few` (e.g. "3"), `many` (e.g. "11"), `two` (e.g. "2"), `zero` (e.g. "0")
For locale "ar" (Arabic) the following quantities should also be defined: `few` (e.g. "3"), `many` (e.g. "11"), `two` (e.g. "2"), `zero` (e.g. "0")
For locale "es" (Spanish) the following quantity should also be defined: `many`
For locale "fr" (French) the following quantity should also be defined: `many` (e.g. "1000000 de jours")
For locale "es" (Spanish) the following quantity should also be defined: `many`
For locale "fr" (French) the following quantity should also be defined: `many` (e.g. "1000000 de jours")
For locale "es" (Spanish) the following quantity should also be defined: `many`
For locale "fr" (French) the following quantity should also be defined: `many` (e.g. "1000000 de jours")
For locale "pt" (Portuguese) the following quantity should also be defined: `many`
For locale "pt" (Portuguese) the following quantity should also be defined: `many`
For locale "pt" (Portuguese) the following quantity should also be defined: `many`
For locale "pt" (Portuguese) the following quantity should also be defined: `many`
For locale "pt" (Portuguese) the following quantity should also be defined: `many`

issue.errorLine1: <string name="scan_subtitle">Scan a product or menu and see how it matches your taste.</string>
<string name="scan_product_subtitle">Scan the coffee package to learn its characteristics</string>
<string name="scan_menu_subtitle">Open camera · read any café menu</string>
<string name="menu_scan_instruction">Point the camera at a café menu and tap to scan</string>
<string name="menu_scan_camera_permission_required">Camera access is required to scan a menu.</string>
<string name="menu_scan_no_items_detected">No coffee items detected. Try scanning a clearer image of the menu.</string>
<string name="scan_lookup_placeholder">Product lookup will appear here soon.</string>
<string name="scan_loading_subtitle">Coffinity is reviewing the coffee package details.</string>
<string name="scan_camera_instruction">Scan the coffee package to learn its characteristics</string>
<string name="scan_camera_permission_required">Camera access is required to scan coffee.</string>
<string name="scan_low_confidence_note">Coffee interpretation confidence is limited for this product, but core details are still shown.</string>
<string name="scan_action_retry_lookup_subtitle">Try scanning the package one more time</string>
<string name="scan_empty_title">Could not detect coffee details, try again</string>
<string name="scan_empty_subtitle">Scan the coffee package again and we’ll check it once more.</string>
<string name="scan_saved_confirmation">Saved. You can update these details any time.</string>
<string name="scan_taste_state_not_enough_subtitle">We need a bit more activity before giving a personal insight.</string>
<string name="scan_taste_state_partial_subtitle">This coffee overlaps with some of your recent preferences.</string>
<string name="scan_taste_state_aligned_subtitle">Based on your repeated behavior, this profile looks close to what you prefer.</string>
<string name="scan_taste_state_mismatch_subtitle">Compared with your past preferences, this coffee may feel outside your usual profile.</string>
<string name="scan_taste_signal_roast_aligned">The roast is close to your usual %1$s preference.</string>
<string name="scan_taste_signal_roast_different">You usually prefer %1$s roast, but this one is closer to %2$s.</string>
<string name="scan_taste_signal_acidity_aligned">Its acidity is close to your usual %1$s profile.</string>
<string name="scan_taste_signal_acidity_different">You usually prefer %1$s acidity, while this coffee is more %2$s.</string>
<string name="scan_taste_signal_origin_familiar">This origin (%1$s) appears in your previous picks.</string>
<string name="scan_taste_signal_type_familiar">Its style (%1$s) is similar to coffees you usually choose.</string>
<string name="scan_taste_signal_limited_evidence">A few more ratings, saves, or scans will make this insight more precise.</string>
<string name="profile_sign_in_sync">Sign in to sync your coffee identity</string>
<string name="profile_section_my_taste_subtitle">Built from your scans, favorites, reactions, and meet activity</string>
<string name="profile_taste_learning_notes">Coffinity is still learning your flavor notes</string>
<string name="profile_empty_taste_learning">We’re still getting to know your taste.</string>
<string name="profile_empty_origin_trends">Explore bean origins to see your trends here</string>
<string name="profile_empty_format_preference">Scan more coffees to reveal your preferred style</string>
<string name="profile_empty_favorite_scans">Scan your first coffee to start your journey</string>
<string name="profile_empty_favorite_beans">Explore bean origins to save your favorites</string>
<string name="profile_empty_menu_picks">Scan a café menu to find your go-to drinks</string>
<string name="profile_empty_events_joined">Join a coffee meet to see activity here</string>
<string name="profile_empty_events_created">Create your first coffee meet and invite people</string>
<string name="settings_notifications_sign_in_required">Sign in to manage your notification preferences</string>
<string name="settings_notifications_permission_row">Allow notification permission to receive push updates on Android.</string>
<string name="notifications_default_message">You have a new Coffinity notification.</string>
<string name="meet_create_subtitle">Plan a simple coffee session nearby.</string>
<string name="meet_nearby_subtitle">Nearby coffee moments you can join right now.</string>
<string name="meet_no_rooms">No meetups in this mood yet.</string>
<string name="meet_section_smart_picks_subtitle">Top-ranked events based on your mood, distance, and timing.</string>
<string name="meet_section_near_you_subtitle">Local coffee meets within your nearby radius.</string>
<string name="meet_section_happening_soon_subtitle">Time-sensitive events starting now or later today.</string>
<string name="meet_section_mood_subtitle">Curated events aligned with this social vibe.</string>
<string name="meet_explore_all_subtitle">Open the full local event browser with filters and sorting.</string>
<string name="meet_explore_empty">No local events match this filter right now.</string>
<string name="meet_find_subtitle">Discover like-minded coffee people in your community</string>
<string name="meet_searching">Finding real coffee people with shared interests…</string>
<string name="meet_discovery_results_subtitle">Real users matched by city, mood, taste, and activity.</string>
<string name="meet_discovery_empty_subtitle">Coffee people from your city will appear here as they join the community.</string>
<string name="meet_discovery_empty_hint">Complete your profile and join events to unlock better matches.</string>
<string name="meet_discovery_profile_hint">Add your coffee mood, brewing interests, and city to get stronger matches.</string>
<string name="meet_coffee_invite_already_pending">You already have a pending invite for this user</string>
<string name="meet_hint">Pick a mood, join a room, or let Coffinity match you in seconds.</string>
<string name="meet_sign_in_notice">Sign in to join coffee meets and create your own</string>
<string name="meet_sign_in_line1">Sign in to join coffee meets</string>
<string name="meet_leave_confirm_message">You can join again anytime if you change your mind.</string>
<string name="meet_edit_subtitle">Update your event details and keep everyone informed.</string>
<string name="meet_cancel_confirm_message">This will remove the event for everyone.</string>
<string name="meet_validation_message">Please complete title, location, time, and purpose.</string>
<string name="meet_form_incomplete_hint">Complete title, location, time, and purpose to continue.</string>
<string name="meet_location_picker_unavailable">Couldn’t open map search. Enter location manually.</string>
<string name="meet_offer_item_remove_hint">Tap an item chip to remove it.</string>
<string name="meet_offer_validation_title">Add an offer title to continue.</string>
<string name="meet_offer_validation_items">Add at least one included item.</string>
<string name="meet_offer_validation_price">Add a valid price for pay-at-venue offers.</string>
<string name="home_mood_hint">How do you feel like drinking today?</string>
<string name="home_mood_top_picks_hint">Top picks for this mood. Tap mood or reshuffle to change.</string>
<string name="meet_signup_subtitle">Create your account to join nearby coffee meets and host your own.</string>
<string name="meet_signup_terms">By continuing, you agree to our Terms and Privacy Policy.</string>
<string name="meet_signup_signin">Already have an account? Sign in</string>
<string name="onboarding_step1_body">Point your camera at any coffee or café menu to discover your taste.</string>
<string name="onboarding_step2_body">Get coffee picks tailored to your mood and flavor preferences.</string>
<string name="onboarding_step3_body">Connect with coffee lovers who share your taste and vibe.</string>
<string name="affiliate_disclosure">Coffinity may earn a small commission — at no cost to you.</string>
<string name="welcome_subtitle">Discover premium beans, warm flavors,\nand beautiful coffee moments every day.</string>
<string name="beans_subtitle">Explore the world through coffee origins</string>
<string name="brew_home_manual_tip_fallback">This method is best prepared manually for authentic flavor and texture.</string>
<string name="brew_summary_espresso">%1$s belongs to the espresso family with balanced body and intensity.</string>
<string name="brew_summary_filter">%1$s highlights clean extraction and hands-on brewing control.</string>
<string name="brew_summary_traditional">%1$s reflects a heritage preparation rooted in coffee culture.</string>
<string name="brew_summary_cold">%1$s delivers a smooth chilled profile with low perceived acidity.</string>
<string name="brew_summary_practical">%1$s is built for convenient daily brewing with stable results.</string>
<string name="brew_how_espresso">%1$s uses pressure-based extraction to build concentrated flavor.</string>
<string name="brew_how_filter">%1$s controls flow and contact time for a clear, structured cup.</string>
<string name="brew_how_traditional">%1$s relies on traditional pacing and ritual to shape taste and aroma.</string>
<string name="brew_how_cold">%1$s extracts with cold water over time for softness and sweetness.</string>
<string name="brew_how_practical">%1$s simplifies brewing into repeatable steps for everyday consistency.</string>
<string name="brew_step_prepare">Prepare fresh coffee and water for %1$s.</string>
<string name="brew_step_core_espresso">Extract %1$s with controlled pressure and shot timing.</string>
<string name="brew_step_core_filter">Brew %1$s with steady pouring and even extraction flow.</string>
<string name="brew_step_core_traditional">Build %1$s gradually with gentle heat and ritual pacing.</string>
<string name="brew_step_core_cold">Extract %1$s slowly at a low temperature.</string>
<string name="brew_step_core_practical">Run %1$s with a simple preset or standardized routine.</string>
<string name="brew_step_finish">Taste and adjust %1$s to your preferred balance.</string>
<string name="brew_best_for_espresso_2">Milk drinks with stronger coffee base</string>
<string name="brew_community_note_one">%1$s worked best for me with freshly ground beans.</string>
<string name="brew_community_note_two">A small adjustment made %1$s noticeably smoother.</string>
<string name="brew_home_note_generic">At home, prepare %1$s with fresh water and calibrated grind for a cleaner cup.</string>
<string name="brew_sign_in_to_review">Sign in to leave a real review linked to your account.</string>
<string name="brew_reviews_empty_subtitle">Be the first to rate this brewing method.</string>
<string name="coffee_detail_cup_profile_body">Explore this cup through %1$s notes and pair it with your preferred brew method.</string>
<string name="meet_signup_error_email">Please enter a valid email address.</string>
<string name="map_subtitle">Travel across the world and discover premium beans by region.</string>
<string name="auth_error_invalid_email">Please enter a valid email address.</string>
<string name="auth_error_weak_password">Password must be at least 6 characters.</string>
<string name="auth_error_email_signin_disabled">Email sign-in is not enabled right now.</string>
<string name="auth_error_network">Check your internet connection and try again.</string>
<string name="discover_hub_subtitle">Explore coffees by craft and origin in one refined hub.</string>
<string name="discover_hub_future_hint">Built to expand with Coffee Types, Trending, and personalized discovery.</string>
<string name="discover_hub_brew_intro">Brew Methods reveals technique-driven coffees and preparation styles.</string>
<string name="discover_hub_origins_intro">Origins brings country profiles and bean variety stories into focus.</string>
<string name="brand_subtitle">Discover coffee brands, products, and real community reviews.</string>
<string name="brand_section_top_rated_subtitle">Powered only by real reviews and community quality signals.</string>
<string name="brand_section_trending_subtitle">Rising now from recent reviews and real engagement.</string>
<string name="brand_section_featured_subtitle">Sponsored visibility slots with fair rotation across brands.</string>
<string name="brand_empty_subtitle">Try another keyword or suggest a missing brand.</string>
<string name="brand_catalog_empty_subtitle">Brand profiles will appear here as the catalog grows.</string>
<string name="brand_products_empty_subtitle">This brand profile is ready for its first product entry.</string>
<string name="brand_sign_in_to_review">Sign in to add a real review linked to your account.</string>
<string name="brand_reviews_empty_subtitle">Be the first to rate this brand.</string>
<string name="brand_product_reviews_empty_subtitle">Be the first to review this coffee.</string>
<string name="brand_suggest_brand_subtitle">Share missing brands so Coffinity can review and add them.</string>
<string name="brand_suggestion_success">Thanks. Your suggestion is now pending review.</string>
<string name="brand_error_duplicate_pending">A similar suggestion is already pending review.</string>
<string name="brand_error_target_not_found">This item is no longer available.</string>
<string name="brand_management_remove_brand_subtitle">Hide this brand from public discovery without deleting its data.</string>
<string name="brand_management_remove_confirm_message">This hides the brand from users while preserving all existing data. You can restore it later.</string>
<string name="rec_relaxed_1_reason">Low agitation and a rounded body for calm, late-morning sipping.</string>
<string name="rec_relaxed_2_reason">Creamy texture and caramel warmth for a gentle ritual.</string>
<string name="rec_relaxed_3_reason">Balanced sweetness with soft foam and very little sharpness.</string>
<string name="rec_energetic_1_reason">Dense extraction with higher intensity for immediate momentum.</string>
<string name="rec_energetic_2_reason">Double espresso diluted for longer sipping without losing punch.</string>
<string name="rec_energetic_3_reason">Compact brew with bright bite and quick prep before work.</string>
<string name="rec_focused_1_reason">Clean floral profile that keeps your palate sharp and clear.</string>
<string name="rec_focused_2_reason">Steady caffeine lift with minimal sweetness distraction.</string>
<string name="rec_focused_3_reason">Controlled ratio and timing for repeatable concentration sessions.</string>
<string name="rec_social_1_reason">Friendly sweetness and milk body that pairs with long conversations.</string>
<string name="rec_social_2_reason">Airy foam and cocoa notes with broad crowd appeal.</string>
<string name="rec_social_3_reason">Sweet caramel profile for relaxed catch-ups and dessert pairing.</string>
<string name="rec_curious_1_reason">Experiment with pressure and ratios for surprising clarity.</string>
<string name="rec_curious_2_reason">Play with bloom and pulse pours to highlight terroir.</string>
<string name="rec_curious_3_reason">Taste how roast level shifts sweetness, acidity, and body.</string>
<string name="rec_calm_1_reason">A slow, meditative pour that grounds your morning with clarity.</string>
<string name="rec_calm_2_reason">Soft sweetness and warmth for a peaceful afternoon ritual.</string>
<string name="rec_adventurous_1_reason">Bright floral notes and berry brightness to awaken curiosity.</string>
<string name="rec_adventurous_2_reason">Bold and unexpected, slow-steeped for 18 hours of deep character.</string>
<string name="rec_cozy_1_reason">Creamy foam and gentle warmth for a cozy end-of-day ritual.</string>
<string name="rec_cozy_2_reason">Full-bodied and deep, perfect for a quiet night in.</string>
<string name="coffee_brazil_santos_description">A balanced Brazilian classic with round body and a creamy cocoa finish.</string>
<string name="coffee_ethiopian_sidamo_description">Vibrant and aromatic with berry sparkle and delicate floral sweetness.</string>
<string name="coffee_colombia_supremo_description">Rich aroma with caramel body and an elegant toasted almond aftertaste.</string>
<string name="coffee_vanilla_latte_description">Smooth espresso and velvety milk lifted by warm vanilla sweetness.</string>
<string name="coffee_caramel_coffee_description">A silky chilled latte with caramel depth and a plush mouthfeel.</string>
<string name="coffee_velvet_cappuccino_description">Classic cappuccino texture with deep cocoa aroma and microfoam luxury.</string>

issue.message: "Syphon" is a common misspelling; did you mean "Siphon"?
Formatting %d followed by words ("scans"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("coffee"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("active"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("people"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("joined"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("attendees"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
issue.errorLine1: <string name="meet_entitlement_capacity_limit_reached">Your plan allows up to %1$d attendees per event.</string>

issue.message: Formatting %d followed by words ("people"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("spots"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("coffee"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("curated"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("bean"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("curated"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("reviews"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("countries"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("reviews"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("products"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("possible"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Permission exists without corresponding hardware `<uses-feature android:name="android.hardware.camera" android:required="false">` tag
This folder configuration (`v26`) is unnecessary; `minSdkVersion` is 26. Merge all the resources in this folder into `mipmap-anydpi`.

issue.message: The resource `R.string.meet_join_locked` appears to be unused
The resource `R.string.meet_field_time` appears to be unused
